title: Untouchable Pieces
pgn:
[FEN "8/4q3/2p5/2n5/p4Q2/4N3/4k3/1K6 w - - 0 1"]

1. Qf1+ Kd2 {The knight is immune...} 2. Qd1+ Kc3 (2... Kxe3 3. Qe1+) 3.
Qc2+ Kb4 (3... Kd4 {Allows the royal fork!} 4. Nf5+) 4. Qb2+ Nb3 (4... Ka5 5. Nc4+ Ka6
6. Qb6#) 5. Qa3+ {The key to the puzzle!} Kc3 (5... Kxa3 $4 6. Nc2#) 6. Qxe7 *
